agent-context.name: Coding Agent Context
agent-context.description: Manages coding agent context/instruction files (e.g., CLAUDE.md, copilot-instructions.md) with project-specific plan references and configurable markers
agent-context.author: spec-kit-core

arch.name: Architecture Workflow
arch.description: Generate or reverse project-level 4+1 architecture views with per-view and full-workflow commands
arch.author: bigsmartben

bug.name: Bug Triage Workflow
bug.description: Assess, fix, and validate bug reports against the codebase with per-bug reports stored under .specify/bugs/<slug>/
bug.author: spec-kit-core

git.name: Git Branching Workflow
git.description: Feature branch creation, numbering (sequential/timestamp), validation, and Git remote detection
git.author: spec-kit-core

intake.name: Intake
intake.description: Normalize PRD, design, and test-case evidence into SDD-ready intake artifacts
intake.author: bigsmartben

preview.name: Spec Kit Preview
preview.description: Generate evidence-backed low, mid, or high fidelity previews from Spec Kit artifacts as Markdown or self-contained HTML
preview.author: bigsmartben

discovery.name: Spec Kit Discovery Extension
discovery.description: Run technical discovery commands for feasibility, technology selection, scenario-specific technical decisions, legacy codebase assessment, implementation understanding, and proof-of-concept validation
discovery.author: bigsmartben

repository-governance.name: Repository Governance
repository-governance.description: Generate project-governance projections from Spec Kit metadata
repository-governance.author: bigben
